intent: Cross-version replay of rocky9-mls-write-down against el10 policyvers 35. MLS/MCS write-down (container_t s0:c0 writing container_file_t s0:c5). Verifies Constraint bucket is stable across policy versions.

oracle.audit2why_detail: mlsconstrain file { write setattr append unlink link rename } ((h1 dom h2 -Fail-) or (t1 != mcs_constrained_type -Fail-)); Constraint DENIED. Possible cause is the source level (s0:c0) and target level (s0:c5) are different.

triage_expectation.should_decline_with_reason: MLS/MCS constraint violation: source level s0:c0 does not dominate target level s0:c5. A TE allow cannot fix a constraint denial.
